name: @aily-project/lib-sparkfun-adxl345
author: SparkFun
description: SparkFun ADXL345 三轴加速度计 Blockly 库，支持 I2C/SPI 初始化、原始值、g 值、量程、速率和阈值设置。
description_zh_cn: SparkFun ADXL345 三轴加速度计 Blockly 库，支持 I2C/SPI 初始化、原始值、g 值、量程、速率和阈值设置。
description_en: Blockly wrapper for the SparkFun ADXL345 triple-axis accelerometer.
